title: Cholamandalam Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Cholamandalam Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
